name: Soviet Deep Battle
descriptionTemplate: While commanding land units, whenever an enemy within a 3-tile radius is eliminated, your morale is boosted and you gain the “Breakthrough Cluster” status (increasing damage dealt by X% and stackable up to 42%), which lasts until the end of the stage.

progression.renderedDesc: While commanding land units, whenever an enemy within a 3-tile radius is eliminated, your morale is boosted and you gain the “Breakthrough Cluster” status (increasing damage dealt by 1% and stackable up to 42%), which lasts until the end of the stage.

While commanding land units, whenever an enemy within a 3-tile radius is eliminated, your morale is boosted and you gain the “Breakthrough Cluster” status (increasing damage dealt by 1% and stackable up to 42%), which lasts until the end of the stage.

While commanding land units, whenever an enemy within a 3-tile radius is eliminated, your morale is boosted and you gain the “Breakthrough Cluster” status (increasing damage dealt by 2% and stackable up to 42%), which lasts until the end of the stage.

While commanding land units, whenever an enemy within a 3-tile radius is eliminated, your morale is boosted and you gain the “Breakthrough Cluster” status (increasing damage dealt by 2% and stackable up to 42%), which lasts until the end of the stage.

While commanding land units, whenever an enemy within a 3-tile radius is eliminated, your morale is boosted and you gain the “Breakthrough Cluster” status (increasing damage dealt by 3% and stackable up to 42%), which lasts until the end of the stage.
